data.body: #6 CORRECTION: the code-review prod-lane multiplier field is trigger_likelihood (common/sometimes/rare) NOT 'likelihood' — the base SeverityAttrs already has likelihood=low/medium/high (mapped by _LIKE01), so CodeSeverityAttrs uses the distinct name to avoid a Pydantic field-override collision (gate caught this). impact_code reads attrs.get('trigger_likelihood','common'). Also: code-review verify step output_schema is 'verification' (code-review.yaml:147) -> switch to 'code_review_verification' contract registered in code_review/contracts.py. 4/8 committed (a23963ca3 #4, 29d9fa863 #1, 068ba1842 #2, 23581b171 #5). #6 round3 + #7 reviews cooking.
